title: teucrium occidentalis var. menthifolium
intro: Teucrium occidentalis var. menthifolium, also known as Western mountain tea, is a subspecies of the Western mountain tea plant, a perennial herb native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, making it a potential treatment for conditions like bronchitis and asthma. Teucrium occidentalis var. menthifolium can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and it is sometimes used in herbal remedies to promote digestive health and relieve symptoms of colds and flu.
